description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:latest Docker image and a global before_script that prints the Python version. Define a single job named tama that runs in the default test stage, executes pip install -r requirements.txt, then runs pycodestyle with --max-line-length=120 and --ignore=W191 on all .py files, and finally runs python tama_testing.py. No services, caches, artifacts, or special rules are needed.
